title: Smoked Salmon Dutch Kofta
description: A fusion of Indian and Dutch flavors, this dish combines the rich taste of smoked salmon with the spices of the Dutch Kofta.
instructions: 1. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium heat.
2. In a bowl, mix together smoked salmon, Dutch Curry Powder, roast cumin, ginger, lemon juice, salt, black pepper, green chilies, bread, and coriander.
3. Mix the ingredients well until they form a smooth paste.
4. Divide the mixture into 6-8 portions, depending on desired kofta size.
5. Shape each portion into a cylindrical shape.
6. Brush the koftas with a little oil and place them on the grill.
7. Cook the koftas for 4-5 minutes on each side, or until they're cooked through.
8. Serve hot with your favorite sides, such as naan or rice.
9. Garnish with chopped cilantro and a squeeze of lemon juice.
